headline: Wren Kitchens files for Chapter 7 bankruptcy. What it means for your order and next steps.
summary: Customers who've spent big money on kitchen upgrades are reeling from the news that Wren Kitchens has filed for Chapter 7 bankruptcy.

headline: Home Depot Partner Wren Kitchens Files For Bankruptcy Leaving Shoppers In Tough Spot
summary: Home Depot faces customer service questions after Wren Kitchens' US closure and bankruptcy filing. Uncertainty for shoppers with open orders.

headline: Couple launched a burrito spot in a Home Depot parking lot—their two restaurants brought in $2.3 million in sales in 2025
summary: Lydia Holmes and John Clarke are the founders of LJ's Lil' Cafe, a burrito restaurant with two locations in Orange County, California.

raw.headline: Couple launched a burrito spot in a Home Depot parking lot—their two restaurants brought in $2.3 million in sales in 2025
raw.summary: Lydia Holmes and John Clarke are the founders of LJ's Lil' Cafe, a burrito restaurant with two locations in Orange County, California.

headline: We started a burrito spot in a Home Depot parking lot – it brings in $2.3 million/year
summary: Lydia Holmes and John Clarke started a food shed in a Home Depot parking lot called LJ's Lil' Café. Business was slow at first, but after Eater LA published a rave review of their breakfast burritos, their sales skyrocketed. In 2025, Holmes and Clarke opened a second location and brought in over $2.3 million in sales for the year.

headline: Wren Kitchens ceases operations in the US, files for bankruptcy
summary: U.K.-based Wren Kitchens, which launched a strategic partnership with Home Depot in 2024, filed for Chapter 7 bankruptcy and closed all its locations.
